headlines.headline: Ilval Financial names new head of enterprise software division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new division head is a standard leadership change that typically has a neutral to slightly positive impact as the market waits for strategic direction.

headlines.headline: Brevep Systems sees 8% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% drop in new customer orders is a direct negative signal regarding demand that will likely pressure the stock price immediately and persist through the quarter.

headlines.headline: Brevep Systems files for regulatory approval of new cloud infrastructure offering

headlines.headline: Ilval Financial announces significant capital expenditure plan for Scandinavia

sentiment.reasoning: A significant capital expenditure plan indicates future growth investment but may weigh on short-term cash flow and margins.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
